task: Create a fresh front-facing running animation from one character image.
phaseScope: Phase A only: action frames, sequence evidence, GIF/strip/board. No Phase B, no source-master, no rig.

action.name: front_facing_run_in_place
action.durationTarget: 1 second selected sequence on ones, 24 frames if visual gates pass

subjectIdentity.description: blonde cartoon female astronaut in white suit, black gloves/boots, blue helmet glass and bright green background

selectedFrameRule: Only model-generated whole-subject frames that visually pass may be copied into frames_selected. Local script frames are evidence only.
